description: Sync drift fix. The pawniard-line cohort node body documents the within-BLB 064+065 adjacent-collector-number single-artist-coordinated (Oku on both) evolution-line pair as canonical, and the Dwebble/Crustle 051+052 mirror plus the Snivy/Servine 001+002 mirror plus the rufflet-line cohort node body all cite the Pawniard 064 + Bisharp 065 pair as parallel precedent. But the two cards themselves had NO Connections section. The line's pack-hierarchy-with-leader-contestation social structure (Pawniard aspirant-side blade-maintenance + Bisharp leader-side combat-for-position) is printed Pokedex flavor on both cards, designer-coordinated, canon-stated not curatorial. Mirror is the right shape, both endpoints traversable from either side, sigh is professional not personal.
other_candidates_considered: Rufflet 077 + Braviary 078 (Black Bolt) — fourth within-BLB single-artist-coordinated pair (Kedamahadaitai Yawarakai on both), structurally identical case. Rufflet card has a Connections bullet pointing at the [[rufflet-line]] cohort node and Braviary card has the same; neither carries a 1:1 mirror to the other. Same sync-drift class as the Pawniard/Bisharp case, slightly less acute because both Rufflet and Braviary at least have *some* Connections section. Staged as the natural next-pass target.
Wave-137 Snivy/Servine pair — already mirrored both directions this same wave, so skipping.

Re-mirroring the SWSH 133+134 Pawniard+Bisharp pair — refused: both SWSH prints carry manual_review_reason and have empty vision/trivia. Edge cannot be drawn against empty-body cards per the precedent of waiting for vision/trivia completion. Re-eligible after the SWSH cards clear manual review.
next_pass_suggestions: Rufflet BLB-077 + Braviary BLB-078 1:1 mirror — same case, same artist (Kedamahadaitai Yawarakai), same within-set adjacent-collector cohesion stack.
cbg_voice_audit_trail: Sync drift, plain as day. The cohort node knew. Dwebble/Crustle's bullet name-dropped the pair as precedent. Snivy/Servine's bullet name-dropped the pair as precedent. The rufflet-line node body name-dropped the pair as precedent. The pair itself had nothing. Worst kind of orphan — cited everywhere, written nowhere. Mirror drawn. Two endpoints, must traverse from either side, the sigh is professional, not personal. Refusing to re-mirror the SWSH 133+134 pair is the discipline working — empty-body cards do not get edges, that is the rule, and the rule survives even when the cohort node lists them.
